intention: This experiment was more challenging than I thought, especially the time limit on the tasks. I had to focus immensely and was challenged by the tasks very much. The hardest part for me was trying to remember the order of images, though the one pattern I did remember during the actual tasks was "skirt, then shirt." I also found myself getting upset after I knew I made a mistake and recognizing where I went wrong immediately.

comments: No glitches, this was very interesting and ironically, I am learning about tests like this in my Psych class so I am happy to participate and give you some data!
